items.criterion: The PR implements KUSABI-CORE-MVP-MEMORY-BINDING-SMOKE-EVIDENCE-001 and does not substitute runtime remediation, local config mutation, release, or publish work.
All changed files remain within the Cell allowed paths, with no src, package, workflow, deploy, local config, DB content, docs/v2, schema, fixture, runner, branch protection, or ruleset edits.
The Cell anchors to issue #228 corrected policy: retained connected/development agents use shared PostgreSQL, stale aliases are inactive/archive, and SQLite exceptions remain FX-only.
The PR does not commit .mcp.json, Claude/Codex settings, env files, secrets, local DB files, or stored memory content.
The handoff requires one-host-at-a-time restart sequencing and rejects broad host restarts.
The handoff requires smoke evidence with log_decision, save_task_state, save_knowledge, search_memory, recover_context, and restart-pack commands when applicable.
Retired, deleted, replaced, duplicate, or stale aliases remain inactive/archive targets and are not revived through migration work.
The Cell prohibits stored memory text, secrets, local DB content, export, reveal, deletion, purge, rewrite, and migration from this PR.
Diff checks and changed YAML/JSON parse evidence are present and match the reported scope.
The PR does not authorize backend parity, common DB completion, UAMP conformance, compliance, federation, release, publish, DLP, zero-leakage, or legal/regulatory claims.
